docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, MONIQUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, KACEY $5,179.60 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,179.60, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF THE DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY NOT LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 10, 2012, RETURN TO PLAINTIFF THE 2002 CHEVROLET TRAILBLAZER AUTOMOBILE AT ISSUE IN THIS CASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KACEY

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, MONIQUE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED JUL-16-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KACEY
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ASSIGNEE VAN NUYS FINANCIAL AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KACEY

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ORANGE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,405.22 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED TO COUNTY OF ORANGE ON: 08/01/2019. AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KACEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR WHITE, MONIQUE ASSIGNED TO VAN NUYS FINANCIAL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3,615.00 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KACEY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,300.00 FILED BY WHITE, MONIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, KACEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
